label: veritas

label: cast

name: career

label: career

name: pioneer
function: Pioneer Mode renderer: risk ladder + constraint review + filed experiments.
label: pioneer

name: frameup
function: Frame-up inspector: composes registry+QA+truth+docs+overclaim+career+pioneer into one health view.
label: frameup

name: reporting
function: ReportWriter: one dated-report seam under reports/<category>/ for every producer.
label: reporting

name: functions
function: Functions check: run each cataloged part's live demo, or cite its test twin.
label: functions

name: terminal
function: In-game computer terminal: wires the diagnostic renderers behind one console.
label: terminal

name: dependencies
function: the dependency gate: every declared dependency must be justified in the ledger
label: dependencies

name: bench
function: engine-tick performance evidence: handle_command throughput + latency
label: bench
notes: Frameless (stdlib time+statistics); files dated evidence under reports/performance/.

name: dashboard
function: the readiness Lens: a server-rendered HTML board + JSON twin over real forge evidence
label: dashboard
notes: Frameless full-stack proof (stdlib html.escape, no template engine); mounted on parts/api.py at GET / and GET /api/status.

name: blueprint
function: the Blueprint: a software idea forged into a validated JSON+Markdown spec
label: blueprint
notes: Frameless (stdlib json+re); fail-loud validator; state is JSON, Markdown/HTML are projections.

name: blueprint_render
function: project a Blueprint to a static, accessible HTML/CSS page (the renderer spine)
label: blueprint_render
notes: Frameless (stdlib html.escape, no template engine); rendered pages are regenerable evidence under reports/blueprints/.

name: config
function: one typed, validated view of the environment (pydantic Settings), credentials redacted
label: config
notes: Pydantic model catalogs the env (PORT, DATABASE_URL, CODEFORGE_ARCHITECT, ...); fails loud on a bad value; the `config` terminal program renders it.

name: blueprint_ai
function: draft a Blueprint from a freeform idea with Claude (schema-enforced structured output)
label: blueprint_ai
notes: Anthropic messages.parse (output_format schema); injected client (mockable, CI-safe); AI output is re-validated by from_dict and always a Tier-4 draft. One API key away.

name: observability
function: structured request logs (structlog) + a Prometheus /metrics endpoint on the HTTP surface
label: observability
notes: One HTTP middleware times each request, emits a JSON log event, and records a metric by route TEMPLATE (bounded cardinality). Prometheus text exposition rendered by a stdlib registry (no scraping library).

name: foundry
function: propose/approve/generate pipeline (proving ground phases 9-10): human-approved, sandboxed, no-overwrite code generation
label: foundry
notes: A PatchProposal writes nothing; a human must approve; generation lands only in the git-ignored workspace/ sandbox, never overwrites, never escapes, never touches source/config/git. Owner-gated @forge verb.
